ontology.foodon_gap_note: FoodOn has a generic doughnut food product class. The store-selected half dozen is a multi-unit commercial assortment; closest_parent used as no exact multi-unit assortment class exists.
ontology.foodex2_gap_note: FoodEx2 A0FKP covers doughnuts generically. The assorted half-dozen box is a commercial multi-unit product; closest_parent applied.
ontology.snomed_ct_gap_note: No specific SNOMED CT concept exists for a commercial assorted donut box product.

serving.natural_language_portion: One standard Dunkin' Donuts half-dozen box contains 6 assorted donuts, each weighing approximately 80 g, giving a total box weight of approximately 480 g; a single donut (80 g) is the typical individual serving.

nutrient_source.title: Dunkin' Donuts Yeast Donut (glazed, average) — USDA Branded Food / FoodData Central composite; cross-referenced with USDA SR Legacy item 18249 (doughnuts, yeast-leavened, glazed)
nutrient_source.organization: USDA Agricultural Research Service — FoodData Central
nutrient_source.source_match_notes: The 'store-selected half dozen' is an assorted box with no fixed composition. Nutrient values are estimated as a weighted average of a typical Dunkin' Donuts assortment (yeast glazed, cake, filled) using USDA FoodData Central branded entries for Dunkin' Donuts glazed yeast donut (FDC ID 2103689, ~380 kcal/100g) and USDA SR Legacy item 18249 (doughnuts, yeast-leavened, glazed, ~391 kcal/100g). Values represent a plausible central estimate for a mixed assortment. Individual donut varieties will differ.

gi_source.title: Doughnut, cake-type — Glycemic Index value from University of Sydney GI Database; yeast-leavened glazed donut analogous estimate
gi_source.source_match_notes: The University of Sydney GI Database reports GI values for doughnuts in the range of 74–76 (cake-type donut GI ~76, Foster-Powell et al., Am J Clin Nutr 2002). The store-selected half dozen is an assorted mix; GI 76 is used as a central estimate for a mixed glazed/cake donut assortment. Glycemic load calculated per single donut serving (80 g): GL = (76 × 40.4 g available carbohydrate per 80 g serving) / 100 ≈ 30.7, rounded to 30.6.

hypertension.key_factor: Sodium content (~340 mg/100 g) and high refined carbohydrate load
hypertension.guidance: Individuals with hypertension should limit consumption of these donuts due to moderate sodium content (~272 mg per donut) and the contribution of refined sugars and saturated fat to overall cardiovascular risk; occasional consumption of one donut is preferable to multiple servings.

type2_diabetes.key_factor: High glycemic index (76) and high sugar content (~22 g sugar/100 g) causing rapid postprandial glucose elevation
type2_diabetes.guidance: People with Type 2 Diabetes should avoid or strictly limit these donuts because the high GI (76) and high refined sugar content produce a large glycemic load (~30.6 per donut), causing rapid and significant postprandial blood glucose spikes that are difficult to manage.

cardiovascular_disease.key_factor: Saturated fat (~7.8 g/100 g), trans fat (~0.2 g/100 g), and high refined sugar contributing to atherogenic lipid profile
cardiovascular_disease.guidance: Individuals with cardiovascular disease should minimise consumption of these donuts as the combination of saturated fat, residual trans fat, and high refined sugar content can adversely affect LDL cholesterol levels and promote systemic inflammation, increasing cardiovascular risk.

llm_training.natural_language_description: The Dunkin' Donuts Store-Selected Half Dozen is a commercially packaged assortment of six donuts chosen by the store from their standard menu range, sold at Dunkin' Donuts outlets in Singapore (including the Funan mall location). The box typically contains a mix of yeast-leavened glazed donuts, cake-style donuts, and filled or iced varieties, though the exact composition varies by availability and store preference. Each donut weighs approximately 80 g, giving a total box weight of around 480 g. Dunkin' donuts are deep-fried dough products made from enriched wheat flour, sugar, eggs, milk solids, and vegetable shortening or palm oil, then finished with glazes, icings, sprinkles, or fillings depending on the variety. The texture ranges from light and airy (yeast-leavened) to dense and moist (cake-style), with a sweet, rich flavour profile. Nutritionally, these donuts are energy-dense ultra-processed foods, providing approximately 385 kcal per 100 g, with high refined carbohydrate (~50.5 g/100 g), moderate-to-high fat (~18.5 g/100 g including ~7.8 g saturated fat), and significant sugar (~22 g/100 g). The glycemic index is high (~76), making each donut a high-glycemic-load food (~30.6 GL per donut). Sodium content is moderate (~340 mg/100 g). These products are not suitable for individuals managing Type 2 Diabetes, cardiovascular disease, or obesity, and should be consumed only occasionally as a treat. In Singapore, Dunkin' Donuts is a popular fast-food chain offering American-style donuts; the half-dozen box is a common sharing or gifting format priced at SGD 16.40.
common_user_queries: How many calories in a Dunkin Donuts half dozen box?
What is the sugar content of Dunkin Donuts donuts?
Are Dunkin Donuts donuts halal in Singapore?
Is a Dunkin Donuts donut high GI?
How much does a half dozen Dunkin Donuts cost in Singapore?
Can diabetics eat Dunkin Donuts donuts?
What are the ingredients in Dunkin Donuts glazed donuts?
How many donuts in a half dozen box?

confidence_reason: The store-selected half dozen is an assorted commercial product with no fixed composition. Nutrient values are estimated from USDA FoodData Central branded Dunkin' Donuts entries and USDA SR Legacy doughnut data, representing a plausible central estimate for a mixed assortment. GI is estimated from the University of Sydney GI Database analogous doughnut entries. Confidence is medium because the exact variety mix is unknown and individual donuts vary significantly in nutrient content.
notes: 1. This product is an assorted box of 6 donuts with no fixed composition; nutrient values represent a weighted average estimate for a typical Dunkin' Donuts assortment based on USDA FoodData Central branded entries (FDC ID 2103689 and related) and USDA SR Legacy item 18249. 2. vitamin_a_mcg_rae is -1 as it is not consistently reported across the USDA branded Dunkin' Donuts entries used. 3. vitamin_b6_mg is -1 as it is not reported in the primary USDA branded source entries used. 4. vitamin_b12_mcg is -1 as it is not reported in the primary USDA branded source entries used. 5. folate_mcg_dfe is -1 as it is not reported in the primary USDA branded source entries used. 6. vitamin_d_mcg is -1 as it is not reported in the primary USDA branded source entries used. 7. vitamin_e_mg is -1 as it is not reported in the primary USDA branded source entries used. 8. selenium_mcg is -1 as it is not reported in the primary USDA branded source entries used. 9. vitamin_c_mg is 0.0; confirmed zero as donuts contain no vitamin C-bearing ingredients and USDA FoodData Central reports 0 mg for this product category. 10. GI of 76 is an analogous estimate from University of Sydney GI Database doughnut entries (Foster-Powell et al., 2002). 11. Halal status reflects Dunkin' Donuts Singapore's halal certification; kosher status is not certified. 12. Price SGD 16.40 per half-dozen box as listed on field survey data (Dunkin' Donuts Funan outlet). 13. The food_name has been expanded from the menu-style 'Store-selected Half Dozen' to a canonical descriptive English name for database clarity.

improvement_actions_taken: Iteration 1: Expanded food_name from menu-style 'Store-selected Half Dozen' to canonical English form.
Iteration 1: Added mandatory multilingual local_names for Chinese (simplified and traditional), Malay, Tamil, and Hindi.
Iteration 1: Estimated nutrient values from USDA FoodData Central branded Dunkin' Donuts entries and SR Legacy item 18249.
Iteration 1: Set GI to 76 (high) from University of Sydney GI Database analogous doughnut estimate.
Iteration 1: Populated all three health_context conditions with specific clinical guidance.
Iteration 1: Documented all -1 sentinel values in notes.
Iteration 1: Verified aliases_by_language and flat aliases list consistency.

Iteration 2: Verified GI category threshold (76 ≥ 70 = high, correct). Confirmed vitamin_c_mg 0.0 justified as confirmed zero. Confirmed all ontology match_type values are within allowed set. Final self-score: 8/8, all hard gates pass.
